mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
INSERT INTO tbl_board (title, content, writer) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{writer})
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_board SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updatedate = NOW(), delflag = #{delFlag} WHERE bno = #{bno}
mapper.select: SELECT bno, title, writer, regdate FROM tbl_board WHERE delflag = FALSE ORDER BY bno DESC
SELECT bno, title, writer, regdate FROM tbl_board ORDER BY bno DESC LIMIT #{count} OFFSET #{skip}
SELECT count(bno) FROM tbl_board WHERE delflag = FALSE

SELECT board.bno, title, writer, regdate, COUNT(rno) AS replyCnt FROM tbl_board board LEFT JOIN tbl_reply reply ON board.bno = reply.bno WHERE board.delflag = FALSE
GROUP BY board.bno ORDER BY board.bno DESC LIMIT #{skip}, #{count}
SELECT COUNT(bno) FROM tbl_board WHERE delflag = FALSE
